description: Google Pay integration via PayPal JS SDK for Expanded Checkout

requirements.browser: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge (Google Pay JS API)
requirements.merchant_id: Google Pay Merchant ID from Google Pay Business Console

v6_pattern.initialization: const sdkInstance = await window.paypal.createInstance({ clientToken, components: ['googlepay-payments'] })
flow: 3. Create Google Pay session via SDK

best_practices: Only show Google Pay button when eligible
Register with Google Pay Business Console for production
Test with Google Pay test cards in sandbox
